title: sutera subnuda
intro: Sutera subnuda, also known as the hairy uttara, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Sutera subnuda include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential in treating conditions such as diabetes and certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, Sutera subnuda is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
